Massive Gains With The Most Advanced Crypto Trading Software

Join savvy traders worldwide earning extremely high income on a daily basis

“Crypto has been, and will keep being the biggest opportunity to create wealth”

Akira Yakamoto, Crypto Bull App Founder and the head of development department.

Up to 94% accuracy

Top quality trading signals are generated automatically for you, based on proven indicators and back tested strategies. Those signals are easily applied on a live platform and turns into profits.

Advanced Analysis System

In addition to traditional tools and proven technical analysis methods, our system constantly evaluating economic and other events that might influence price actions. The algorithm selectively picks only the highest probabilityy trades, in order to keep risk at minimum, and maximize potential profits.

User Friendly

Platform that can be easily used, both by beginner or experienced traders. No prior experience or technological knowledge is needed. No downloads required. Crypto Bull App is a web based application that can be used by anyone from anywhere, using a computer or a mobile device.

Crypto Bull Application is a new and revolutionary trading software that accurately predicts short and long term fluctuations of digital and Fiat currencies around the world. This is done by applying winning trades, based on the same patterns that were proven to work extremely well time after time over the years. The developer of this brilliant software is Akira Yakamoto, who is a computer and financial prodigy. He found out a way to predict crypto currencies movements and to confirm those assumptions with Forex pairs patterns and economic events. Yakamoto gathered up with a team of elite computer engineers and economists to complete the task of creating an ultimate signals solution, and that's how this magical piece of trading software was born.
Step 1

Sign Up - FREE

Fill in your basic details including an active email and a valid phone number. All you need is a computer or a mobile device, and a proper internet connection.

Step 2

Activation

Once registered you'll be assigned with one of our trusted and licensed brokers.
Fund your account with the minimum required in order to activate it.

Step 3

Make Money

Start getting the signals with the highest quality in the industry.Experience outsdanding performance and enjoy a steady stream of income.

FAQ

1. What is the Crypto Bull App?

Crypto Bull App is a new and revolutionary trading software that accurately predicts short and long term fluctuations of digital and Fiat currencies. Profits are done by applying winning trades, based on patterns and strategies that were proven to work extremely well time after time over the years.

2. How does it work?

The internal algorithm for identifying patterns that Akira created, controls everything inside of the trading platform. It shows you exactly the carefully chosen pairs that you must trade with, and the predicted direction of the movement.

3. How Much Money Can I Make?

Important to note that there are no guarantees and trading activity involves with some risk.

4. Do i need to pay?

There are no charges for getting a license and start using the software. Note that in order to activate the software and start trading, you'll need to fund your investment account with the minimum required by the broker, usually 250$. This money is yours to be used for trading and can be taken out at any moment you chose to.

5. Can I make withdrawals?

Absolutely. You can chose to make a withdrawal and take out your profit at any time you chose to. All requests are processed by our finance team within 24 hours and then sent in the requested payment method. Not that wire transfers might take 3-5 business days until the money arrives to your bank.

6. Can anyone use it?

Anyone who has citizenship in one of the eligible countries can join. No knowledge or experience is needed. You don't need to download anything as this is a web based platform that can be operated using any computer or a mobile device with a basic internet connection.
